scope: forum media warmup, resident lifecycle, instant focus playback
moved_logic_domains: video resident ownership separated from active playback ownership
video prewarm made repeatable instead of one-shot
dependency_changes: VideoMedia now receives resident lifecycle helpers from mediaLifecycleRuntime
forum media coordinator uses resident warm-start helpers instead of active-cap helpers for prewarm
detected_risks: HAR showed repeated 206 requests for the same MP4 URLs, consistent with unload/reload thrash
Previous preload=none path could override warmup and leave videos cold until focus
Previous prewarm path was one-shot and did not re-prime videos after later unload
runtime_risk: medium reduced to low-medium after resident/warm separation
notes: eslint passed for touched media files
local HAR sample: 364 video requests, 25 duplicate video URLs with repeated 206 range fetches
